pg99-p1-s1: difficult thing to do, but it must be done if any results are to be expected.
pg99-p1-s2:
If persisted in for a few months, the
effect on a man's family is sure to be great.
pg99-p1-s3:
The most incompatible people discover they have a basis upon which they
can meet.
pg99-p1-s4: Little by little the family may see their own defects and admit them.
pg99-p1-s5:
These can then be discussed in an
atmosphere of helpfulness and friendliness.
pg99-p1:
difficult thing to do, but it must be done if any results are to be expected. If persisted in for a few months, the
effect on a man's family is sure to be great. The most incompatible people discover they have a basis upon which they
can meet. Little by little the family may see their own defects and admit them. These can then be discussed in an
atmosphere of helpfulness and friendliness.
pg99-p2-s1: After they have seen tangible results, the family will perhaps want to go along.
pg99-p2-s2:
These things will come to pass
naturally and in good time provided, however, the alcoholic continues to demonstrate that he can be sober, considerate,
and helpful, regardless of what anyone says or does.
pg99-p2-s3: Of course, we all fall much below this standard many times.
pg99-p2-s4:
But we
must try to repair the damage immediately lest we pay the penalty by a spree.
pg99-p2:
After they have seen tangible results, the family will perhaps want to go along. These things will come to pass
naturally and in good time provided, however, the alcoholic continues to demonstrate that he can be sober, considerate,
and helpful, regardless of what anyone says or does. Of course, we all fall much below this standard many times. But we
must try to repair the damage immediately lest we pay the penalty by a spree.
pg99-p3-s1: If there be divorce or separation, there should be no undue haste for the couple to get together.
pg99-p3-s2:
The man should be sure
of his recovery.
pg99-p3-s3: The wife should fully understand his new way of life.
pg99-p3-s4:
If their old relationship is to be resumed it
must be on a better basis, since the former did not work.
pg99-p3-s5: This means a new attitude and spirit all around.
pg99-p3-s6:
Sometimes it
is to the best interest of all concerned that a couple remain apart.
pg99-p3-s7: Obviously, no rule can be laid down.
pg99-p3-s8:
Let the
alcoholic continue his program day by day.
pg99-p3-s9:
When the time for living together has come, it will be apparent to both
parties.
pg99-p3:
If there be divorce or separation, there should be no undue haste for the couple to get together. The man should be sure
of his recovery. The wife should fully understand his new way of life. If their old relationship is to be resumed it
must be on a better basis, since the former did not work. This means a new attitude and spirit all around. Sometimes it
is to the best interest of all concerned that a couple remain apart. Obviously, no rule can be laid down. Let the
alcoholic continue his program day by day. When the time for living together has come, it will be apparent to both
parties.
pg99-p4-s1: Let no alcoholic say he cannot recover unless he has his family back.
pg99-p4-s3:
In some cases the wife will
never come back for one reason or another.
pg99-p4-s4: Remind the prospect that his recovery is not dependent
pg99-p4:
Let no alcoholic say he cannot recover unless he has his family back. This just isn't so. In some cases the wife will
never come back for one reason or another. Remind the prospect that his recovery is not dependent
